---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve TahitiSpeak
title: '[BUG] '
labels: ['bug', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📱 Environment Information
**Device & Browser:**
- OS: [e.g. iOS 16, Windows 11, macOS 13, Android 12]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 118, Safari 16, Firefox 119, Edge 118]
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 14, Desktop, iPad, Samsung Galaxy S23]
- Screen Resolution: [e.g. 1920x1080, 375x812]

**Application:**
- TahitiSpeak Version: [e.g. v1.2.3 or commit hash]
- Environment: [e.g. Production, Staging, Development]
- User Account Type: [e.g. Free, Premium, Admin]

## 🎓 Learning Context
**If this bug affects the learning experience:**
- Lesson/Module: [e.g. "Basic Greetings - Lesson 3", "Cultural Stories - Polynesian Myths"]
- User Level: [e.g. Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced]
- Learning Path: [e.g. Conversational Tahitian, Cultural Immersion, Business Tahitian]
- Feature Affected: [e.g. Pronunciation Practice, Progress Tracking, Community Forum, Flashcards]

## 🏝️ Cultural Content Impact
**If this affects Tahitian language or cultural content:**
- Content Type: [e.g. Audio pronunciation, Cultural story, Traditional phrase]
- Language Accuracy: [e.g. Incorrect translation, Missing diacritics, Wrong pronunciation]
- Cultural Sensitivity: [e.g. Inappropriate context, Missing cultural context]

## 📸 Screenshots & Media
If applicable, add screenshots, screen recordings, or audio samples to help explain your problem.

## 🔍 Additional Context
- Console errors (if any): 
- Network connectivity: [e.g. WiFi, Mobile data, Slow connection]
- Frequency: [e.g. Always, Sometimes, First time]
- Workaround found: [e.g. Refresh page, Clear cache, Use different browser]

## 🚨 Severity Level
- [ ] 🔴 Critical - App crashes or core functionality broken
- [ ] 🟠 High - Major feature not working, affects learning progress
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Minor feature issue, workaround available
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided all relevant environment information
- [ ] I have included steps to reproduce the issue
- [ ] I have attached screenshots/media if applicable
- [ ] I have checked if this affects cultural content accuracy
